subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that the breezes of Revelation might draw him unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم لتجذبه نفحات الوحی الی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
